# Auto-Generated Leads

## Target Niches
1. E-commerce shops
2. Real estate agents
3. Dental/medical offices
4. Restaurants
5. Logistics companies

## Outreach Strategy
- Find businesses via Google Maps/website
- Send personalized cold emails
- Offer free audit → upsell

## Quick Wins
1. Fiverr: Lower price to $50 for quick reviews
2. Upwork: Apply to 5 jobs daily
3. Local: Email small businesses in HK

## Action Plan
- Day 1-3: Set up Fiverr, apply to 10 jobs
- Day 4-7: Send 20 cold emails
- Day 8-14: Close first client

## Status
Looking for first $500 client!
